CWE: CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')
exploit_info: The simple-git library blocks the -u/--upload-pack flag on git clone to prevent command execution. However, git allows combining single-character flags (e.g., -vu = -v -u). The current safety check only catches arguments starting with -u, missing combined flags like -vu, -4u, -6u etc.
